stores.name: Brim Shoreditch
stores.address: 152 Shoreditch High St, London E1 6JE, United Kingdom

reviews.author: Hannah W.
reviews.text: The smash double is unreal — crispy lacy edges, proper Halal beef, and the brim sauce is dangerously good. Queue moved fast even on a Friday night.

reviews.author: Omar R.
reviews.text: Finally a Halal smash spot in Shoreditch that takes the patty seriously. Loaded fries are a full meal on their own. Staff were lovely.

reviews.author: Priya N.
reviews.text: Burgers are excellent and the shakes are thick enough to stand a straw in. Lost a star only because seating fills up quick at peak.

stores.name: Brim Gulberg
stores.address: Shop 12, Ground Floor, Mall 1, Main Blvd, Gulberg III, Lahore, Pakistan

reviews.author: Zara H.
reviews.text: Main Boulevard needed this. Perfectly smashed patties, melty cheese, and a sauce I'd buy by the bottle. Get your Brim on — easily the best burger in Gulberg.

reviews.author: Usman T.
reviews.text: Brought friends from out of town and they were blown away. Fast service, spotless place, and 100% Halal. The Spicy Smash Down is the move.

reviews.author: Mahnoor I.
reviews.text: Big, juicy and delicious every single time. Gets packed in the evenings — go early or be ready to wait for a table.

stores.name: Brim DHA Phase 4
stores.address: Plaza 253 CCA, DHA Phase 4, Lahore, Pakistan

reviews.author: Hamza S.
reviews.text: My go-to in DHA. The patty-to-bun ratio is spot on and the shakes are thick. Open late too, which is a lifesaver after work.

reviews.author: Aleena F.
reviews.text: Big juicy burgers exactly as advertised. The chicken smash is criminally underrated and everything is properly Halal.

reviews.author: Bilal A.
reviews.text: Great food and a clean, modern space. Parking in CCA can be tight at peak but the burgers more than make up for it.

stores.name: Brim Lake City
stores.address: Block M-3A, Lake City, Raiwind Road, Lahore, Pakistan

reviews.author: Sana K.
reviews.text: So glad Brim came to Lake City. No need to drive into town for a proper smash burger anymore. Fresh, juicy and worth every rupee.

reviews.author: Daniyal R.
reviews.text: The dynamite fries have a real kick and the burgers are huge. Staff are friendly and the place is spotless. Get your Brim on!

reviews.author: Iqra M.
reviews.text: Lovely addition to the neighbourhood. Can get busy on weekends so order ahead if you're in a hurry.

stores.name: Brim Faisalabad
stores.address: Susan Road, Madina Town, Faisalabad, Pakistan

reviews.author: Ahmed N.
reviews.text: Susan Road just levelled up. Clean, modern, and the burgers are seriously good. The Spicy Smash Down is addictive — finally a proper smash in Faisalabad.

reviews.author: Hira B.
reviews.text: My new weekend spot. Quick service, big juicy burgers, and everything is Halal. The shakes are thick and the fries are loaded.

reviews.author: Saad K.
reviews.text: Great food and a nice vibe. A touch pricey but the quality justifies it. Try the double smash.

stores.name: Brim Johar Town
stores.address: Block R, Phase 2, Johar Town, Lahore, Pakistan

reviews.author: Fatima Z.
reviews.text: Late-night cravings sorted. Open till 2am, juicy patties, and the loaded fries are unreal. My new Johar Town regular.

reviews.author: Talha M.
reviews.text: Solid smash burgers and great milkshakes. The cheese skirt on the patty is a thing of beauty. Gets busy in the evenings.

reviews.author: Rabia S.
reviews.text: Love that the whole menu is Halal. Brought the family and everyone found something. Big, juicy and exactly what we wanted.
